title: Norwegian Black Treacle Fritters
description: Sour and sweet, these traditional Norwegian fritters are a nostalgic treat made with black treacle and a hint of rice flour. Perfect for a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: Black Treacle
ingredients.notes: Norwegian black treacle, such as 'Norwegian Brown Sauce' or 'Elvis Sauce'

ingredients.name: Rice Flour
ingredients.notes: Khao Khua or glutinous rice flour

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the black treacle, rice flour, buckwheat flour, egg, molasses, baking soda, and salt. Mix until well combined.
Heat the coconut oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil and fry until golden brown.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve warm.
